sections.paragraph:
Original: גּעשׁ

Transliteration: gâ‛ash

Phonetic: gaw-ash'

BDB Definition:

  1. to shake, quake
    1. (Qal) to shake
    2. (Pual) to be shaken up, convulsed
    3. (Hithpael) to shake back and forth, toss or reel to and fro
    4. (Hithpoel) to reel to and fro

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 371

Part(s) of speech: Verb
